mapper.sql: select m.id, m.tenant_id, m.purchase_bill_no, m.purchase_bill_date, m.department_id, m.user_id, m.purchase_bill_status, m.split_status, m.total_amount, m.urgency_level, m.expected_delivery_date, m.reject_reason, m.del_flag, m.delete_by, m.delete_time, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, case when m.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(nullif(trim(m.audit_by), ''), m.update_by) else m.audit_by end as audit_by, case when m.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(m.audit_date, m.update_time) else m.audit_date end as audit_date, coalesce(nullif(trim(au.nick_name), ''), au.user_name) as audit_person_name, d.id as d_id, d.name as d_name, u.user_id as u_user_id, u.user_name as u_user_name, u.nick_name as u_nick_name from dep_purchase_apply_agg m left join fd_department d on m.department_id = d.id left join sys_user u on m.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user au on au.user_id = ( case when m.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(nullif(trim(m.audit_by), ''), m.update_by) else m.audit_by end )
mapper.select: select m.id, m.tenant_id, m.purchase_bill_no, m.purchase_bill_date, m.department_id, m.user_id, m.purchase_bill_status, m.split_status, m.total_amount, m.urgency_level, m.expected_delivery_date, m.reject_reason, m.del_flag, m.delete_by, m.delete_time, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, case when m.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(nullif(trim(m.audit_by), ''), m.update_by) else m.audit_by end as audit_by, case when m.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(m.audit_date, m.update_time) else m.audit_date end as audit_date, coalesce(nullif(trim(au.nick_name), ''), au.user_name) as audit_person_name, d.id as d_id, d.name as d_name, u.user_id as u_user_id, u.user_name as u_user_name, u.nick_name as u_nick_name, e.id as sub_id, e.parent_id as sub_parent_id, e.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, e.material_id as sub_material_id, e.material_name as sub_material_name, e.material_spec as sub_material_spec, e.unit as sub_unit, e.unit_price as sub_unit_price, e.qty as sub_qty, e.amt as sub_amt, e.reason as sub_reason, e.supplier_name as sub_supplier_name, e.brand as sub_brand, e.model as sub_model, e.line_no as sub_line_no, e.warehouse_id as sub_warehouse_id, wh.name as sub_warehouse_name, e.del_flag as sub_del_flag, e.delete_by as sub_delete_by, e.delete_time as sub_delete_time, e.create_by as sub_create_by, e.create_time as sub_create_time, e.update_by as sub_update_by, e.update_time as sub_update_time, e.remark as sub_remark, mat.id as m_id, mat.code as m_code, mat.name as m_name from dep_purchase_apply_agg m left join fd_department d on m.department_id = d.id left join sys_user u on m.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user au on au.user_id = ( case when m.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(nullif(trim(m.audit_by), ''), m.update_by) else m.audit_by end ) left join dep_purchase_apply_agg_entry e on e.parent_id = m.id and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) left join fd_warehouse wh on wh.id = cast(e.warehouse_id as unsigned) left join fd_material mat on e.material_id = mat.id where m.id = #{id} and m.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (m.del_flag = 0 or m.del_flag is null)
mapper.update: update dep_purchase_apply_agg set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in #{id}

update dep_purchase_apply_agg_entry set material_id = #{materialId}, material_name = #{materialName}, material_spec = #{materialSpec}, unit = #{unit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, qty = #{qty}, amt = #{amt}, reason = #{reason}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, line_no = #{lineNo}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, del_flag = 0, delete_by = null, delete_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remark = #{remark} where id = #{id} and parent_id = #{parentId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
